channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Palestinian baby dies in West Bank after Israel blocks urgent medical care
item.description: Israeli forces also shoot dead a 16-year-old boy in the occupied West Bank and kill two Palestinians in Gaza.

item.title: Turkiye gears up for its first NATO summit in 22 years
item.description: Leaders of the NATO member states are expected in Turkiye by July 7 for a summit - the first it will host in 22 years.

item.title: Albanian court frees protesters who rallied against Kushner-linked resort
item.description: The planned resort linked to US President Donald Trump's son-in-law has become a flashpoint for anti-government protests

item.title: Mexico vs England LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 – last 16
item.description: Live coverage and text updates with full build-up and team news ahead from our commentary stream of Mexico vs England.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: All to know as Ronaldo’s Portugal play Spain in the last 16
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo is just one of several key talking points before Portugal and Spain clash in a round of 16 epic in Dallas.

item.title: 10,000 people evacuated as wildfire tears through southern France
item.description: A fast-moving wildfire has forced around 10,000 people to evacuate after burning more than 1,500 hectares in France.

item.title: How will the rise of right-wing populism affect Latin America?
item.description: Conservatives are winning elections across the region.

item.title: 8 injured, including 4 children, in New York City Fourth of July shooting
item.description: A shooting at a Fourth of July celebration in the US city of New York wounded eight victims, four of whom are children.

item.title: Volunteers vow to keep searching for Venezuela earthquake survivors
item.description: Rescue teams in Venezuela’s La Guaira State say they’re never going to give up their search for earthquake survivors.

item.title: Australia thrash England to win record seventh Women’s T20 World Cup
item.description: Beth Mooney (64) and Phoebe Litchfield (48) lead Australia’s stunning seven-wicket win over the hosts at Lord’s.

item.title: 12-tonne whale removed from DR Congo beach
item.description: A dead whale weighing about 12 tonnes has been recovered from the beaches of Muanda.

item.title: America at 250: Democracy’s greatest experiment?
item.description: Chris Hedges reflects on 250 years of US independence - the nation's ideals, contradictions, and what it has become.

item.title: Russia says Ukraine rejects local ceasefire in dispute over Kostiantynivka
item.description: Russia says its forces have taken the city of Kostiantynivka in Donestk, Ukraine denies that.

item.title: Sons of Iran’s leader Ali Khamenei attend funeral, but Mojtaba is absent
item.description: Massive crowds gathered in Tehran to mourn Khamenei’s death, with chants calling for revenge against the US and Israel.

item.title: Osaka knocks out top-seeded Sabalenka to reach Wimbledon quarterfinals
item.description: Naomi Osaka beat world number one Aryna Sabalenka in straight sets to book her maiden Wimbledon quarterfinal.

item.title: Palestinians rally outside Al-Shifa hospital, demanding medical evacuation
item.description: Protest outside Al-Shifa Medical Complex demanding Israel lift travel restrictions on those leaving the Gaza Strip.

item.title: Trump thanks FIFA as it suspends Balogun’s ban for Belgium World Cup match
item.description: Balogun was set to miss USA vs Belgium last 16 tie but will now be available as FIFA surprisingly ends his suspension.

item.title: Lawmaker McGovern: Americans need to ‘fight for the soul’ of the US
item.description: The left is rising because Americans ‘want more from the Democrats’, US Representative Jim McGovern argues.

item.title: US Congressman denies existence of Palestinians in interview
item.description: US Congressman Randy Fine claims “there is no such thing as Palestinian”, on interview show The Next Generation.

item.title: 50 Houthi fighters killed in renewed clashes in Yemen
item.description: Yemeni government officials say the Houthis launched a surprise offensive targeting army barracks in southern Hodeidah.

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi threatens Guam with catastrophic winds and flooding
item.description: The storm system is expected to reach landfall on Monday morning.

item.title: What is the religious and political messaging behind Khamenei’s funeral?
item.description: The Islamic Republic is leaning into religious imagery to hone its political messages locally and across the region.

item.title: Brazil vs Norway 1-2: FIFA World Cup 2026 – last 16
item.description: All the updates as Norway beat Brazil with a brace from Erling Haaland in the round of 16 knockout stage.

item.title: Syria delays first session of transitional parliament without explanation
item.description: The transitional parliament aims to draft a new elections law during its 30-month term.

item.title: Charles Leclerc wins F1 British Grand Prix behind safety car
item.description: Charles Leclerc collects his first victory of the 2026 F1 season after late safety car confusion in the final laps.
